textByHashes.80aafd76128ae0c84455514e3e62c4fbe27f1ad6: Well, I can cure plain cowhides into pieces of leather ready for crafting.
textByHashes.1988658b2f65f34e924747ec66f8c8c21dd970cd: I work with ordinary, hard or dragonhide leather and also snakeskin. What would you like to know about?
textByHashes.e751ad26fe34f29fe890322db7b3c3f099f2415b: I can work one piece of cow hide into ordinary leather. It only costs one piece of gold.
textByHashes.dd241fadb13f9f3ccf23fb54523268ea556e18a5: Is there anything else I can help you with?
textByHashes.c656c16df775d847c474920a5ee691fd5b552a48: Hard leather is made by specially treating normal leather by wetting and drying several times.
textByHashes.c983dad83edb24f46e5af87818269c83c11e89c2: It's then treated with pine oils. It's harder wearing than ordinary leather.
textByHashes.24f071a993734349ab1b543884d44d5cb4e36dbd: I can work one piece of snake hide into a snakeskin. It only costs 15 pieces of gold. Snakeskin armour is great for intermediate level rangers and provides more defence than hard and studded leather.
textByHashes.24065b22601487b0c639fe0142071f5c6cad2ff4: Dragon leather is made from dragonhides. One piece of hide can be worked into one piece of dragon leather. It costs 20 coins each piece.
textByHashes.2a86818a9748513b64fcefcfe2654de12dfa1ee3: Dragon leather is hard-wearing and has excellent flexibility. You can make strong and supple armour with this.
textByHashes.6440fc2620cb6c12300c1f306100469fe759ccc5: You may be bored now, but an arrow in the backside will soon fix that!
